query: SELECT id, newApplicant, transferAgencyName, JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.newApplicant') as fd_newApplicant, JSON_EXTRACT(formData, '$.transferAgencyName') as fd_transferAgencyName FROM submissions WHERE newApplicant IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
